name: Insight Meditation Community of Washington
description: The Insight Meditation Community of Washington (IMCW) is one of the largest vipassana meditation communities in the eastern United States. Founded by Tara Brach, it offers weekly sitting groups, daylong retreats, classes, and an annual teacher training. Based in the Washington, DC, metropolitan area, IMCW draws thousands of practitioners and streams Tara Brach's weekly talks to a global audience.
